name: busbar
description: A Pulumi package for creating and managing Busbar LLM gateway resources through its admin API.
attribution: This Pulumi package is based on the [`busbar` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/GetBusbar/terraform-provider-busbar).

nodejs.packageDescription: A Pulumi package for creating and managing Busbar LLM gateway resources through its admin API.
nodejs.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/GetBusbar/terraform-provider-busbar)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-busbar` repo](https://github.com/getbusbar/pulumi-busbar/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-busbar` repo](https://github.com/GetBusbar/terraform-provider-busbar/issues).

python.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/GetBusbar/terraform-provider-busbar)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-busbar` repo](https://github.com/getbusbar/pulumi-busbar/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-busbar` repo](https://github.com/GetBusbar/terraform-provider-busbar/issues).

caCertPem.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate to trust the admin server's certificate (e.g. a private CA).

clientCertPem.description: PEM-encoded client certificate for mTLS against a cert-gated admin plane.

endpoint.description: Admin listener URL, e.g. https://busbar-admin.internal:8081. May also be set with the BUSBAR_ENDPOINT environment variable.

insecure.description: Skip TLS certificate verification. Development only; never use against production.

token.description: Operator admin token, sent as the x-admin-token header. May also be set with the BUSBAR_ADMIN_TOKEN environment variable.

provider.description:
The provider type for the busbar package. By default, resources use package-wide configuration
settings, however an explicit `Provider` instance may be created and passed during resource
construction to achieve fine-grained programmatic control over provider settings. See the
[documentation](https://www.pulumi.com/docs/reference/programming-model/#providers) for more information.

endpoint.description: Admin listener URL, e.g. https://busbar-admin.internal:8081. May also be set with the BUSBAR_ENDPOINT environment variable.

insecure.description: Skip TLS certificate verification. Development only; never use against production.

token.description: Operator admin token, sent as the x-admin-token header. May also be set with the BUSBAR_ADMIN_TOKEN environment variable.

configVersion.description: The monotonic config version after the last apply. Process-local; resets to 0 on gateway restart.

document.description: The full config apply document as a JSON string: {"config": {DeployCfg}, "providers": {name: ProviderDef}}. The `config` key is required; `providers` is optional. This is the write model (the boot-file shape), NOT the redacted read projection returned by GET /config.

The full config apply document as a JSON string: {"config": {DeployCfg}, "providers": {name: ProviderDef}}. The `config` key is required; `providers` is optional. This is the write model (the boot-file shape), NOT the redacted read projection returned by GET /config.

stateInputs.description: Input properties used for looking up and filtering Config resources.

configVersion.description: The monotonic config version after the last apply. Process-local; resets to 0 on gateway restart.

document.description: The full config apply document as a JSON string: {"config": {DeployCfg}, "providers": {name: ProviderDef}}. The `config` key is required; `providers` is optional. This is the write model (the boot-file shape), NOT the redacted read projection returned by GET /config.

at.description: Pipeline stage: request, route, attempt, or completion. Null lets busbar place it by kind.

default.description: Whether this hook is the default for its stage. Write-only (not echoed by reads).

global.description: Whether the hook applies globally (all pools). Defaults to false. May read back true if wired via global_hooks.

kind.description: Transport contract: tap (fire-and-forget, non-blocking) or gate (blocking, may rewrite/reject). Immutable grant; changing it replaces the hook.

name.description: Unique hook name (<= 256 chars; not a reserved terminal name). Immutable; changing it replaces the hook.

onEmpty.description: Fallback policy when the hook yields an empty ranking: weighted, reject, or first. Write-only (not echoed by reads).

onError.description: Behavior when the hook errors/times out: a terminal (weighted, reject, first, nothing) or another hook name. Defaults to nothing.

priority.description: Ordering priority within a stage. Defaults to 0.

prompt.description: Prompt-content access grant: no, ro, or rw. Defaults to no. Immutable grant; changing it replaces the hook. (rw is invalid on a tap.)

settings.description: Opaque per-hook settings as a JSON object string (<= 64KiB, <= 256 keys). Defaults to {}.

socket.description: Unix socket path to the hook process. Exactly one of socket or webhook.

timeoutMs.description: Per-call timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 1.

user.description: Caller-identity access grant: no or ro. Defaults to no. Immutable grant; changing it replaces the hook.

webhook.description: Webhook URL for the hook. Exactly one of socket or webhook.

allowedPools.description: Pools this key may target. Empty/unset means unrestricted. Immutable; changing it replaces the key (the mint spec is fixed at creation).

awsAccessKeyId.description: AWS-style access key id, when issueAwsCredential is true. Returned only at creation.

awsSecretAccessKey.description: AWS-style secret access key, when issueAwsCredential is true. Returned only at creation; stored in state and never re-read.

budgetPeriod.description: Budget window: one of total, daily, monthly. Defaults to total. Immutable; changing it replaces the key.

createdAt.description: Epoch seconds the key was minted.

enabled.description: Whether the key currently resolves. A key is created enabled; disable it out-of-band via the admin API.

issueAwsCredential.description: When true, also mint an AWS-style access-key-id + secret access key (SigV4/Bedrock inbound auth). Both are returned only at creation. Immutable.

maxBudgetCents.description: Spend cap in cents over the budget window (>= 0). Omit for unlimited. Mutable via PATCH.

name.description: Human-readable label (<= 256 chars). Immutable; changing it replaces the key.

rpmLimit.description: Requests-per-minute cap (>= 1). Omit for unlimited. Mutable via PATCH.

secret.description: The plaintext bearer secret (sk-bb-...). Returned only at creation; stored in state and never re-read.

tpmLimit.description: Tokens-per-minute cap (>= 1). Omit for unlimited. Mutable via PATCH.

outputs.description: A collection of values returned by getInfo.

id.description: The provider-assigned unique ID for this managed resource.

pulumi:providers:busbar/terraformConfig.description: This function returns a Terraform config object with terraform-namecased keys,to be used with the Terraform Module Provider.
